creator: hardy.schumacher@globalfoundries.com
text:
Update for irrlicht engine to v1.6 is still available.
It contains several bugfixes and enhancements.

Fix: 

Makefile:
---PORTVERSION= 1.5.1
+++PORTVERSION= 1.6
---SHARED_LIB_VER= 1.5.1
+++SHARED_LIB_VER= 1.6
---JOYSTICK        "Support for Linux Joystick" off
+++JOYSTICK        "Support for Linux Joystick" on
